name: publish
invariants: output.ok === true || typeof output.reason === 'string' || typeof output.error === 'string'
_note: Live boot reality: the reachable personas.publish is the Z4 roadmap stub — it HONESTLY returns { ok:false, reason:'roadmap' } (the lens renders a 'coming soon' badge / Failed flash). It is NOT a fake success. The real publish (toggle marketplace visibility, author-gated) lives in the currently-unwired server/domains/personas.js. DO NOT assert ok:true here until registerPersonasActions(registerLensAction) is imported in server.js — that is the wiring fix that makes this macro real.
